# Kaustubh Jogle — Software Engineer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio website of Kaustubh Jogle, a Software Engineer specialising in React, TypeScript, and full-stack development. Currently building scalable digital lending platforms at IIFL Finance.

## About

Kaustubh Jogle is a Software Engineer based in Mumbai, India, with expertise in building high-performance web applications. He specialises in React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Java Spring Boot. His work focuses on creating scalable, user-friendly interfaces with an obsession for detail, performance, and craft.

## Experience

- **Software Engineer at IIFL Finance (2023–Present)**: Designed and developed scalable, user-friendly interfaces and migrated 8+ legacy modules to a modern React-based stack for IIFL's digital lending platform, powering 5,000 Cr+ AUM and 300 Cr+ monthly disbursals. Improved application speed by 25% using React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Saga, and Ant Design.

## Skills

### Technical
- UI Architecture (95%)
- API Design (88%)
- Performance Optimisation (85%)
- System Design (80%)
- Database Modelling (78%)
- DevOps & CI/CD (72%)

### Soft Skills
- Technical Writing, Code Review, Mentorship, Cross-functional Collaboration, Product Thinking, Agile/Scrum

## Tech Stack
- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Java
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite
- **Backend**: Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs

## Projects

### WhatTheCron — Cron Expression Builder & AI Translator
Built a full-stack two-way cron expression translator with a visual field builder and AI-powered natural language input using the Gemini API. Designed REST API endpoints using Next.js Route Handlers to securely proxy Gemini API requests server-side.
- Tech: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, REST API, Gemini API
- GitHub: https://github.com/Kaustubhjogle/What-The-Cron
- Live: https://what-the-cron.vercel.app/

### PromptPane — AI Chat Navigator
A Chrome extension that adds a navigable prompt index to AI chat interfaces. Every message you sent gets a reply preview, clickable to jump straight there. Ships to real users on the Chrome Web Store. Works on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.
- Tech: Chrome Extension, JavaScript, Open Source
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/promptpane/ejijlepcjdgncielegenkmglcbleacbl

## Education

- **B.Tech in Computer Engineering** — Thadomal Shahani Engineering College (2021–2023), CGPA 9.58
- **Diploma in Computer Engineering** — Shri Bhagubhai Mafatlal Polytechnic (2017–2022), 94.80%
- **SSC** — John XXIII High School (2016–2017), 90.60%
